Package io.forja.tokens

Enum SemanticVariant

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<SemanticVariant>
io.forja.tokens.SemanticVariant
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<SemanticVariant>
public enum SemanticVariant extends Enum<SemanticVariant>
The shared semantic color palette used by Forja components.

One enum replaces what was previously four near-identical per-component enums (icon, badge, chip, status-dot). Each value maps to a token-driven color in base.css and to a matching CSS pseudo-class on the component's style class (e.g. .forja-badge:success).

Components apply the active variant via applyTo(Node, SemanticVariant), which sets the matching pseudo-class on the node and clears the others.

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    ACCENT
    Brand accent — pairs with -forja-accent.
    DANGER
    Destructive / error — pairs with -forja-danger.
    DEFAULT
    Neutral / default visual treatment.
    INFO
    Informational — pairs with -forja-info.
    MUTED
    De-emphasized — pairs with -forja-text-muted.
    SUCCESS
    Positive / success — pairs with -forja-success.
    WARNING
    Cautionary — pairs with -forja-warning.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • DEFAULT

      public static final SemanticVariant DEFAULT
      Neutral / default visual treatment.

    • MUTED

      public static final SemanticVariant MUTED
      De-emphasized — pairs with -forja-text-muted.

    • ACCENT

      public static final SemanticVariant ACCENT
      Brand accent — pairs with -forja-accent.

    • SUCCESS

      public static final SemanticVariant SUCCESS
      Positive / success — pairs with -forja-success.

    • WARNING

      public static final SemanticVariant WARNING
      Cautionary — pairs with -forja-warning.

    • DANGER

      public static final SemanticVariant DANGER
      Destructive / error — pairs with -forja-danger.

    • INFO

      public static final SemanticVariant INFO
      Informational — pairs with -forja-info.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static SemanticVariant[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static SemanticVariant valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • pseudoClass

      public javafx.css.PseudoClass pseudoClass()
      Returns the CSS pseudo-class matching this variant (lower-case enum name).

    • applyTo

      public static void applyTo(javafx.scene.Node node, SemanticVariant active)
      Toggles the active variant on node and clears every other semantic variant pseudo-class. Use from a component skin's variant listener to keep CSS in sync.
      Parameters:
      node - target node — typically the component itself
      active - variant to activate, or null to clear all
